notes: Game launches but after Intro only black screen
title: Breathedge

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Game stuck in black screen after first scene
title: Breathedge

notes: Menus & game load fine. Slight audio tick/artifact with "background music". Audio is fine when music turns off. Black screen/freeze when game loads first cut scene. Error from terminal is, "LogMediaUtils: Error: Cannot play file://../../../Breathedge/Content/Movies/Breathedge_StoryVideo_Eng.mp4, because none of the enabled media player plug-ins support it". Appears to be a UE4 MP4 playback issue.
title: Breathedge

notes: It runs at 40% of windows performance. If I could turn of motion blur that might change to playable (80% framerate). Some error message in starting the game or exiting not consistently.
title: Breathedge

notes: Requires spoofed AMD card Device IDs and Vendor IDs in DXVK, and NVAPI DLLs disabled. (dxvk.conf must be placed in /steamapps/common/Breathedge/Breathedge/Binaries/Win64)  Cannot skip past MP4 cinematics when starting a new game. Importing a Windows gamesave with cinematics skipped allows you to play the game. Audio has sample conversion/dropout issues. (volume mixing not present in some Wine versions) UE4 graphics post-processing hampers performance, leave post-processing on Low.
title: Breathedge

notes: (Follow up report) To solve audio issues in this game, you need to do "winetricks xact" (or the protontricks equivalent) and add a DLL override for "xaudio2_7" (Native) in winecfg.
title: Breathedge
